<div class="section-outer section-orange">
 <div class="section-header">
  <span class="section-header-text">In this section, we will discuss the basics of agentic engineering.</span>
 </div>
 <div class="section-grid section-grid-4">
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="lightbulb"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Motivation</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="git-compare-arrows"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Assistants vs Agents</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="rocket"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Launching Claude Code</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="layers"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Architecture</div>
  </div>
 </div>
</div>
